summary: Phase 2 Batch 3 re-test: verified 2 bug fixes — undo prehab addition and competition/set hasCompetition. All 7 tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/profile/intake uses 'goal' and 'experience' fields (not 'primaryGoal'/'experienceLevel') — ensure frontend is aligned
GET /api/program returns 404 — the plan is stored under saved_plans collection and accessed through other routes; this may be intentional but should be documented
seed_data_creation: Used user_a@theprogram.app; cleared and re-applied SI Joint / Pelvis injury flag to create fresh prehab change-log entries for undo testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both bug fixes confirmed working. Correct intake field names: 'goal', 'experience'. Correct injury apply endpoint: POST /api/plan/apply-injury-update with newInjuryFlags=[]. Change-log response uses 'changeId' key (not 'id').
rca_of_issue: Bug Fix 1: undo_plan_change correctly detects prehab additions (original='(none)') and removes the exercise from ALL sessions across ALL weeks (reverted=4 confirmed). Bug Fix 2: POST /api/competition/set returns hasCompetition=true. Both verified with fresh test state.
